connect.title: Your Memory
connect.subtitle: Enter your memory space
connect.remember_login: Keep me signed in for 15 days
connect.security: Space ID is your private key. Do not share it with others.

error.invalid: Cannot access this space. Please check your ID and try again.

connect.how_1: Your agent accumulates memories during conversations
connect.how_2: You can also ask your agent to remember specific things
connect.how_3: This dashboard shows what has been saved

search.placeholder: Search your memories — try natural language…
search.no_results_hint: Try different words, or clear the search to see all

add.title: Add a memory
add.prompt: What do you want your agent to remember?
add.footer: This memory will be marked as "Saved by you"

delete.title: Delete this memory?
delete.warning: Once deleted, your agent will no longer remember this.

empty.title: This space has no memories yet
empty.description: Memories are accumulated as you chat with your agent. You can also save the first one now.

info.pinned: "Saved by you" are things you explicitly asked your agent to remember
info.insight: "Learned from chats" are memories AI automatically extracted from conversations
info.note: What you see here are saved memories, not the reasoning behind each response

export.title: Export memories
export.description: Download all active memories to your device. The file is in JSON format.
export.breakdown: {{pinned}} saved by you · {{insight}} learned from chats
export.note: The export includes all active memories regardless of filters. Original timestamps are preserved.

import.title: Import memories
import.description: Upload a previously exported memory file (JSON format) to add memories to this space.
import.note: Imported memories will be processed in the background. Original timestamps may not be preserved.
import.success: File uploaded. Memories are being imported.

facet_desc.preferences: Tools, styles & how you like things done
facet_desc.experiences: Events and stories you've been through

analysis.title: Memory Analysis
analysis.taxonomy_warning: Taxonomy is unavailable right now. Showing local fallback labels.
analysis.loading_source: Preparing memories in the current range…
analysis.empty: No memories to analyze in the current time range.
analysis.retrying_updates: Update polling failed. Retrying with backoff…
analysis.degraded_body: The live analysis service is currently returning server errors. Your memory list still works normally, and you can retry later.
analysis.failed_body: This analysis run did not complete. You can start it again later.
